Name: [Ally] Officer Cui
Desc:
All squad members' CRIT DMG increases by <color=#2BAD00>24%</color>.
Active Skill: Bites and tears at the target enemy, dealing <color=#f0d12b>Physical DMG</color>. This skill can be consecutively triggered, up to 2 times.
Desc2: Small but functional, it's a great help to Proxies in the Hollows.
